title: YouTube Channel Scraper
description: Scrapes YouTube channels by category and location, or scrapes a specific list of channel handles.

mode.title: Run Mode
mode.description: full = discover channels then scrape them; discovery_only = only find channel handles; scrape_channels = scrape the channelHandles list directly.

region.title: Region Preset
region.description: Pre-configured region with relevant categories and locations. Choose 'custom' to specify your own.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Content categories to discover (used when region = custom or to override preset).

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Geographic locations to search within (used when region = custom or to override preset).

channelHandles.title: Channel Handles (scrape_channels mode)
channelHandles.description: List of YouTube channel handles or URLs to scrape directly. Used when mode = scrape_channels.

maxChannels.title: Max Channels to Scrape
maxChannels.description: Maximum number of channels to scrape (0 = unlimited).

maxVideosPerChannel.title: Max Recent Videos Per Channel
maxVideosPerChannel.description: Number of recent videos to scrape per channel.

downloadThumbnails.title: Download Thumbnails to Key-Value Store
downloadThumbnails.description: If enabled, profile pics and video thumbnails are downloaded and stored in the actor's Key-Value store.

minSubscribers.title: Minimum Subscribers Filter
minSubscribers.description: Skip channels with fewer subscribers than this value (0 = no filter).

maxDiscoveryRetries.title: Max Discovery Retries
maxDiscoveryRetries.description: How many times to retry the discovery phase on failure.

headless.title: Headless Browser
headless.description: Run the browser in headless mode. Always true on Apify; set to false for local debugging only.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy settings. Leave empty to run without a proxy or use Apify Residential proxies.
